name: regression-tests
description: Multi-agent regression-test workflow. The regression-tests skill locks current behavior with coverage planning + parallel test authoring + adversarial review specialist team + synthesis + mutation testing + fuzzing. Supports Rust (cargo + clippy + cargo-mutants + cargo-fuzz) and C# (dotnet + Stryker.NET + SharpFuzz). Ships a Rust binary `regression-tests` in bin/ exposing the deterministic helpers as subcommands.
